title: Blackspur BB-BD400 Bungee Cord
features: Heavy duty elastic design provides constant tension and firm hold
Non-marring high strength hooks eliminate knots
Ideal for use with tarps, cars, trucks, trailers, bikes etc
description: Product Description Blackspur bungee cords are manufactured from heavy duty elastic which provides constant tension and a firm hold. The non-marring high strength hooks eliminate knots and the 1/2inch diameter provides maximum holding power. They are ideal for use with tarps, cars, trucks, trailers, bikes etc for quick, convenient load binding. Measures 1/2 inch diameter by 24 inch (61cm) length. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 2x Bungee Cord
